summary:
The provided evidence shows no association between c-KIT alterations—mutations or aberrant signaling—and uveal melanoma pathogenesis; instead, known oncogenic events involve monosomy 3, chromosome 8q gains, and specific gene mutations such as BAP1 loss. Thus, despite being targeted successfully in other forms of cutaneous melanoma, c-Kit remains an unvalidated therapeutic target for uveal melanoma due to lack of genetic or functional relevance within this tumor type.

The summary above contains more than two sentences. Please revise it strictly according to instructions:

Summary: There is no evidence linking c-Kit mutations or dysfunction to uveal melanoma progression. Consequently, c-Kit remains an invalid therapeutic target for uveal melanoma based on current data.
